sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Warning notice of firing at Kingsbury ranges. The range danger area consists mainly of Kingsbury Woods and access to these is restricted to times when the range is not in use. Do not enter the danger area when the range is in use, this is a danger to life. If ‘red flags’ or lights are hoisted, regardless of the timings, do not enter the training area. Learn more about accessing MOD training areas safely .

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content:
The full perimeter of the range danger area is signed to warn of danger. UK military firing times for all ranges Public access to military areas

Kingsbury Range firing times February 2026
